title: MCP Protocol
subtitle: Connect to external tool servers and expose Tigerpaw tools to AI agents
connectedServersDesc: External MCP servers providing tools to Tigerpaw
addServerDesc: Connect to an external MCP server to use its tools
commandHelp: Shell command to start the MCP server process
serverUrlHelp: SSE endpoint URL of the running MCP server
envVarsHelp: Optional environment variables passed to the server process
exposeAsServerDesc: Allow external AI agents to use Tigerpaw tools via MCP protocol
exposedToolsDesc: These Tigerpaw tools are available to connected MCP clients
noServersDesc: Add an external MCP server to extend Tigerpaw with additional tools
